facebook.caption: POV: you stop scrolling dive shops and just book the one with a 4.9. Phu Quoc Local Guide on 94 Nguyễn Trung Trực does snorkeling and scuba for every level. No dive cert? No problem. First-timers go out. Experienced divers go deep. The reef does the rest. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
